entries.title: HOMILY ON THE WORDS 'GIVE HEED TO YOURSELF.' on deuteronomy 17:20
entries.excerpt: You are a wayfarer, like to him who prayed, "Direct my steps." "Give heed to yourself" that you may swerve not from the path, that you decline neither to the right nor the left. Keep to the king's highway. The architect should lay the firm foundation of faith which is Jesus Christ and let the builder look to his materials: not wood, nor hay nor stubble but gold, silver, precious stones.
